name: justcode-agent-workspace
description: Multi-LLM Developer Agent Workspace with A2A multi-agent loops and MCP support

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build --prefix frontend && rm -rf backend/public_html && cp -r frontend/dist backend/public_html
scripts.start: npx -y concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "Backend,Frontend" -c "purple,blue" "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
